ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the company operates */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the company's environmental data */,
  "headquarters_location" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the company's official website */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number or tax ID of the company */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the company (for context in environmental impact) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company that submitted the report */,
  "report_year" INTEGER /* Year for which the report is submitted */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., Draft, Submitted, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the report was last updated */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the report (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "question_number" TEXT /* Question number as it appears in the questionnaire */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the question (e.g., Scope 1, Scope 2, Scope 3, General) */,
  "mandatory" INTEGER /* Whether the question is mandatory or optional */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional description or context for the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report containing the response */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the question being answered */,
  "answer" REAL /* The answer provided to the question */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the answer (e.g., metric tons, kg) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., internal audit, third-party verification) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report associated with the document */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., PDF, Excel, Image) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or title of the document */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_uploader_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., company representative, analyst, admin) */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the user represents (if applicable) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., Active, Inactive, Suspended) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string or comma-separated list of permissions (e.g., 'read, write, approve') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
